73791.subject: Potvrdenie rezervГЎcie - NOVA SPA Premium Spa&Wellness
73791.body: Bookio. DobrГҪ deЕҲ p. Oleh Novosadov, Potvrdzujeme tГҪmto VaЕЎu rezervГЎciu v NOVA SPA Premium Spa&Wellness . Detail rezervГЎcie DГЎtum a ДҚas: 29.5.2026, 17:30 RezervГЎcia na meno: Oleh Novosadov SluЕҫba: 2 hodinovГҪ vstup Doba trvania: 2h Cena: 68 вӮ¬ PoДҚet osГҙb 2 PridaЕҘ do kalendГЎra Google kalendГЎr , InГ© (iCal, Outlook,...) Viete o naЕЎich permanentkГЎch? NahoДҸ si kartu NOVA20 za 240 EUR (NOVA10 za 140вӮ¬). Je oproti beЕҫnГ©mu jednorazovГ©mu vstupu o 50% lacnejЕЎia, prenosnГЎ a teda pouЕҫiteДҫnГЎ pre celГә rodinu alebo kolektГӯv, platnГЎ celГҪch 365 dnГӯ od aktivГЎcie. DostupnГ© aj online. Pri kГәpe naЕҫivo aj s bonusom a krГЎsnym balenГӯm. Ako jedinГҪ koЕЎickГҪ prГ©miovГҪ wellness sme tu pre VГЎs 360 dnГӯ v roku, 7 dnГӯ v tГҪЕҫdni, od 9:00 do 21:00 v 100% kvalite. VГЎЕЎ tГӯm NOVA SPA. Ak chcete zruЕЎiЕҘ VaЕЎu rezervГЎciu, kliknete ZruЕЎiЕҘ rezervГЎciu Kde nГЎs nГЎjdete? NOVA SPA Premium Spa&Wellness , ЕҪriedlovГЎ 11, 04001 KoЕЎice-StarГ© Mesto UkГЎЕҫ na mape +421911463729 recepcia@novaspa.sk https://www.novaspa.sk VaЕЎe Гәdaje Oleh Novosadov +421951292548 novosadovoleg@gmail.com TeЕЎГӯme sa na VaЕЎu nГЎvЕЎtevu a prajeme VГЎm peknГҪ deЕҲ. Vedeli ste, Еҫe v NOVA SPA Premium Spa&Wellness mГҙЕҫete kГәpiЕҘ aj DarДҚekovГ© poukГЎЕҫky RezervaДҚnГҪ systГ©m Bookio.sk В© 2024 Bookio. VЕЎetky prГЎva vyhradenГ©.

73788.subject: Beyond SOL-USDC
73788.body:
View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/eaa70932-7ce4-467e-b338-a662ed575d6a/0xR_NL_Banner_Heading_Wordmark.jpg?t=1776775276)
Caption: 

GM and happy Friday.

YesterdayвҖҷs tape was less about broad crypto beta and more about infrastructure catching a bid. Crypto equities led on regulatory relief and stablecoin exposure, Perps outperformed on continued HYPE accumulation, and SolanaвҖҷs next test is whether its execution edge can extend beyond SOL-USDC into less liquid pairs and larger clips.

вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/42e942ec-f31d-4957-8722-a3ac7b121e1e/0xR_NL_Market_Update.png?t=1767631151) [Market Update]
Caption: 

Crypto equities led the cross-sector board over the last 24 hours, with the Crypto Equities Index up 10.02% and the 2025 Crypto Equity Cohort up 9.02%. Perps followed at +6.39%, while DeFi gained 4.62% and Solana Eco rose 2.48%. Traditional risk assets were positive but much more muted, with the NASDAQ 100 up 0.98% and the S&P 500 up 0.62%. BTC lagged at -1.20%.

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/95761b44-e43d-476e-be4a-3192a941e50f/image.png?t=1780060929)
Caption: 

Within crypto equities, GEMI stood out as the market continued to price in this weekвҖҷs CFTC relief motion from May 27, which moved to unwind the prior judgment against Gemini and removed a key regulatory overhang. GEMI finished up 10.94%, giving the stock the cleanest single-name catalyst in the 2025 crypto equity basket.

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/ae516e4d-c488-4ecc-9d12-b7330fe13d58/image.png?t=1780060929)
Caption: 

Similarly, strength in Perps continues to be led by Hyperliquid, where multiple accumulation vehicles, including ETFs, the Assistance Fund, and DATs, continue to buy even above previous all-time highs. Hyperliquid Strategies bought $82.6M of HYPE last week, adding 1.45M HYPE, or 0.65% of circulating supply. HYPE ETFs added another 894K HYPE, worth $50.9M, while the Assistance Fund added 248K HYPE, worth $14.1M. Combined, these channels absorbed roughly 2.59M HYPE, or 1.16% of circulating supply, in one week.В 

_вҖ” __[Shaunda](https://x.com/shaundadevens)_

вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”

# Prop AMMs Beyond SOL-USDC

Solana has proven its execution edge on SOL-USDC. The harder test is whether that model travels to other pairs. The opportunity is a unified execution layer for any asset; the constraint is whether each market can attract enough flow, reference pricing, and maker depth to support tight quotes.

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/f

Fear and Greed has dropped to
33
(Fear)
and BTC is near
$73K
this morning after falling another 3% yesterday. Yesterday saw
the largest single-day Bitcoin ETF outflow since January, with
JPMorgan attributing the move to a broad retreat from the
debasement trade as Iran peace deal expectations reduced
safe-haven demand.

The market is under real pressure. But this weekend marks a
structural shift: CME futures go 24/7, permanently ending the
weekend gap pattern traders have tracked for years. Change is
happening even as sentiment hits its lowest point in months.

Let's dive in.

Latest News
-----------

The First US Spot BNB ETF Just Launched

VanEck listed the first US spot BNB ETF on Nasdaq under the
ticker VBNB on May 29, giving investors regulated access to the
fourth-largest cryptocurrency through a standard brokerage
account.

BNB has been roughly flat over the past year while most Layer 1
peers posted significant declines.

What on-chain activity metrics does VanEck cite to support BNB's
resilience?
